check_installed_verbs.title: Check installed Winetricks verbs
check_installed_verbs.description: Scanning for commonly required runtime components: Visual C++, .NET, DirectX, and DXVK.

show_missing_deps.title: Missing dependencies found
show_missing_deps.description: One or more commonly required runtime components are not installed. Installing them may resolve the issue.

fix_install_deps.title: Install missing dependencies
fix_install_deps.description: Install the missing runtime components via Winetricks. This may take several minutes and cannot be undone automatically.

verify_install.title: Did installing dependencies help?
verify_install.description: Try launching the program again to check whether the dependency issue is resolved.

check_dlls.title: Check for specific DLL files
check_dlls.description: Looking for specific DLL files that should be present in the bottle after dependency installation.

show_dll_findings.title: Missing DLL files detected
show_dll_findings.description: Some expected DLL files are missing from the bottle. Try installing them manually via Winetricks or check if an alternate verb provides the needed files.

check_game_config.title: Check for known dependency requirements
check_game_config.description: Checking the game database for known dependency requirements for this program.

suggest_game_deps.title: Known dependency configuration available
suggest_game_deps.description: A known-good dependency list exists for this program in the game database. Check the Game Config section for recommended Winetricks verbs.

escalate.title: Additional diagnostics needed
escalate.description: The automated dependency checks have not resolved the issue. Enhanced diagnostics or a support report may help identify the problem.

resolved.title: Problem resolved
resolved.description: The dependency issue has been fixed. You can export a session report for your records.
